title: Automation Request: When a new group is created, create an item in a board
excerpt: It would be great to have an automation that when a new group is created in a board, an item is created in a different board that automatically connects all data in that group. This would help with the limitations on das…

posts.author: spelkey (Shannon Pelkey)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have an automation that when a new group is created in a board, an item is created in a different board that automatically connects all data in that group. This would help with the limitations on dashboards pulling only a set number of boards, as it would automate the process of creating a Master board of information.

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @spelkey
You can absolutely do this in monday.com. You can try the recipe below.

posts.author: spelkey (Shannon Pelkey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @amber-upstream This is for an item, versus I want just if a new GROUP is created. If I have it so every single time an item is created it will be chaos!

posts.author: aza.rose (Aza Rose)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would also be extremely beneficial to notify people. When a new group is created notify somebody… would love to see it.

Use Case-
I do an import from excel to update personnel data and every time (even if we are just updating information) a new group is made- sometimes with nothing it. would love it if when that happened my HR team got a notification that the information was up to date… If anybody knows how to do this currently I would also take some advice.

posts.author: CoreyHathaway (Corey Hathaway)
posts.cookedHtml:
I also agree this would be beneficial automation. Basically similar to a “when status changes” but make it “when a group is created” then “xyz”

My use case would be-

When group is created move items from group A to the newly created group.
